case_title: LENAHAN, FRANCIS DANIAL VS GUERRERO, ADRIAN RAMIREZ et al

docket_entries.description: MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GUERRERO, ADRIAN RAMIREZ

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LENAHAN, FRANCIS DANIAL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GUERRERO, ADRIAN RAMIREZ GUERRERO, MIRHAM STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GUERRERO, MIRHAM
PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION IS DENIED. ORDER MAILED TO ALL PARTIES.

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY LENAHAN, FRANCIS DANIAL AS TO DEFENDANT GUERRERO, ADRIAN RAMIREZ GUERRERO, MIRHAM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-29-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-29-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO DEC-27-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TO CURE SERVICE TO DEFT GUERRERO, ADRIAN. DEFECTIVE SERVICE AS TO DEFT GUERRERO, MIRHAM.
CORRESPONDENCE FORWARDED TO PRO TEM MCGILL -CASE UNDER SUBMISSION. ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE REQUESTED BY PRO TEM.
